title: Airport Planning & Capacity
text:
Airport planning encompasses capacity, master and regional planning, aviation forecasting, and airspace planning. Activities include providing planning guidance, producing the biennial National Plan of Integrated Airport Systems, developing capacity studies, and collecting boarding and cargo data to determine airport categories.
